name: Cod Fish Cakes
tagline: Crisp cod-and-potato cakes with lemon and dill — British coast classic
highlight: Cod, potato, herbs — golden patties with no shellfish anywhere

hero.alt: Cod fish cakes with golden crust and lemon wedge
hero.caption: fish cakes — golden cod

healthFacts: Combining cod with potato extends the fish without losing flavor.
Pan-frying in less oil than deep-frying = crisp crust, lower fat.

steps.title: Boil potatoes and steam fish
steps.detail: Boil potatoes 15 min until tender. Steam cod over the same pot 6 min until just cooked. Cool both.
steps.tip: Cooking the cod over the pot of potatoes saves a step and a pot.

steps.title: Mix the cake
steps.detail: Mash potatoes lightly. Flake cod in. Stir in egg, dill, scallions, lemon zest, Dijon, salt, pepper.
steps.tip: Don't over-mash — texture is half the appeal.

steps.title: Form and dredge
steps.detail: Form into 8 patties. Dredge each in flour, then panko, pressing crumbs in. Chill 10 min.
steps.tip: Chilling firms the patties so they don't fall apart frying.

steps.title: Fry golden
steps.detail: Heat 1/4 inch olive oil in a skillet over medium. Fry patties 3 min per side until deep gold. Drain on a rack. Serve with lemon.
steps.tip: Tartar or yogurt-dill sauce on the side seals the deal.
